title: License: Elastic License 2.0 (ELv2)
description: All Kortix artifacts are now published under the Elastic License 2.0 (ELv2). LICENSE is included in npm packages and baked into all Docker images.

changes.text: Replaced custom KPSL v1.0 with standard Elastic License 2.0 (ELv2)
LICENSE file included in @kortix/sandbox npm tarball
LICENSE baked into all Docker images at /LICENSE
All @kortix npm packages now declare license: Elastic-2.0

title: Onboarding, memory & unified secrets
description: Dedicated onboarding page, re-enabled memory plugin with personalization layer, unified secrets/env API, todo panel, SSE-driven data layer, full filesystem explorer, and legacy code cleanup.

changes.text: Dedicated /onboarding page with macOS-style bootup flow
Todo panel above chat input with context modal on click
Token progress click opens context modal
File explorer starts at filesystem root (/)
Skip and redo onboarding via query params (?skip_onboarding, ?redo)
Local PostgreSQL Docker and cron trigger support
Re-enabled memory plugin with personalization layer (SOUL.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md)
Unified secrets into single /env API with per-key error resilience
Replaced React Query + polling with Zustand sync store driven by SSE
Consolidated Providers into Secrets Manager page
Purged legacy @kortix/shared dead code and old thread system
Reuse onboarding session on reconnect, await command before setting sessionId
s6 env dir permissions for kortix-master writes
Router model names and usage display
Softened aggressive red error states to muted neutral tones
Restored missing tool deps (firecrawl, replicate, tavily)

title: Update UI, Docker images & release pipeline
description: Frontend update banner and changelog page, multi-platform Docker images on Docker Hub, hardened release script with artifact tracking and idempotent publish.

changes.text: Update banner — see what's new before updating, dismiss per version
Changelog page at /changelog — full version history with artifact checklist
Sidebar update indicator in the left panel
Docker images rebuilt multi-platform (amd64 + arm64) on Docker Hub
Release script checks all prerequisites upfront and tracks artifacts
Idempotent CLI publish — resumes safely after partial failures
Dockerfile falls back to latest CLI if pinned version not yet on npm

title: Docker image refresh
description: Rebuilt all Docker images with v0.5.0 code baked in. Frontend now shows changelog preview, API serves changelog data, sandbox includes CHANGELOG.json.

changes.text: Docker images rebuilt with changelog UI and unified versioning
Frontend shows what's new before updating
API serves changelog from GitHub for update checks

title: Unified versioning & upstream sync
description: Synced with OpenCode upstream v1.2.6, unified all dependency versioning into sandbox/package.json, added changelog system so users see what changed before updating.

changes.text: Changelog system — see what's new before updating
Live update now also updates CLI binary and agent-browser
Python dependencies managed centrally via package.json
Unified release script — one command publishes everything
All versions read from sandbox/package.json (single source of truth)
Dockerfile and postinstall.sh both read versions from package.json
Fixed s6 service path in postinstall (s6-rc.d not services.d)
Removed stale build version from health endpoint
Fixed agent-browser version conflict (aligned to ^0.10.0)
Synced with OpenCode v1.2.6 (Database/Drizzle migration, 145 commits)

title: Stability & pip dependency management
description: Bug fixes, branding polish, added centralized pip package management to postinstall.

changes.text: Pip packages managed via postinstall.sh
Various stability fixes

title: Browser automation & skills system
description: Added agent-browser integration, skills framework, secret store, and LSS semantic search.

changes.text: Agent browser integration for web automation
Skills framework for extensible agent capabilities
Secret store for secure credential management
Local semantic search (LSS) integration
s6-overlay service management

title: Live update system
description: Introduced the sandbox live update system with kortix-master proxy and s6 service management.

changes.text: Sandbox live update system via npm
kortix-master proxy server
Environment variable management

title: Project scanning
description: Added Project.scan() for automatic git repo discovery in workspace.

changes.text: Project.scan() — automatic git repo discovery

title: Initial release
description: First sandbox release with basic OpenCode integration.

changes.text: Initial sandbox release with OpenCode integration
